project_request: Interactive prompt engineering workspace with multi-provider testing and version history.

questions.question: How should the main workspace be laid out?
options: Tabbed interface with prompt and responses on separate tabs
questions.answer: Prompt left, responses right (split view) — developers are used to editor+output layouts

questions.question: How should multi-provider responses be displayed?
questions.answer: Side-by-side columns for comparison, with option to expand one to full width

questions.question: How should version comparison look?
questions.answer: Diff view like GitHub PRs with red/green highlighting

questions.question: How should the template library be organized?
options: Categories with tags and a 'Featured' section
questions.answer: Categories with tags and a 'Featured' section for most-used templates
